note_text:
Patient: 68M presenting with refractory coronary artery disease.
Conservative management including beta-blockers, dietary and lifestyle modification was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with coronary artery disease.
Referring cardiology physician requests authorization for pci.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with coronary artery disease
